name: mssql-mcp-server
description: Query Microsoft SQL Server from Claude. Schema discovery, parameterized queries, chart-ready JSON.
long_description: An MCP server that lets Claude discover schemas, run queries, and build live dashboards across one or more Microsoft SQL Server instances. Read-only by default; writes are gated behind a config flag and an explicit confirm token. Predictable JSON output, no SQL parser between Claude and the database.

host.title: SQL Server host
host.description: Hostname or IP. Examples: sql-prod.company.com, localhost, localhost\\SQLEXPRESS

database.title: Default database
database.description: Database to use unless a tool call overrides it.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: sql: SQL login (cross-platform). windows: integrated auth (Windows host only, requires msnodesqlv8).

password.title: Password
password.description: SQL login password. Ignored when auth=windows.

alias.title: Connection alias
alias.description: Short name passed as `server` to tools. Defaults to 'default'.

read_only.title: Read-only
read_only.description: Disables execute_write. Informational — real protection comes from the SQL login's permissions.

encrypt.title: Encrypt connection
encrypt.description: Use TLS for the connection. Recommended.

trust_server_certificate.title: Trust self-signed cert
trust_server_certificate.description: Skip TLS cert validation. Use for self-signed certs in dev/intranet only.

tools.name: list_objects
tools.description: Tables and views in a schema.

tools.name: describe_object
tools.description: Columns, primary key, indexes, foreign keys for one table or view.

tools.name: search_objects
tools.description: Fuzzy search across table, view, and column names.

tools.name: sample_rows
tools.description: Peek at up to 50 real rows.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Run a SQL statement, returns columns + rows.

tools.name: execute_write
tools.description: Run a write statement (gated by read_only=false + sha256 confirm token).

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List saved markdown notes/skills about this dataset.

tools.name: read_skill
tools.description: Read one saved skill markdown file.

tools.name: write_skill
tools.description: Create or update a saved skill markdown file.
